title: Make text columns compatible with the timeline view
excerpt: I’d like the bars in the timeline view to be able to display the data from a text column instead of just take the data from the ‘item’ column

posts.author: SMcGregor (Sarah McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like the bars in the timeline view to be able to display the data from a text column instead of just take the data from the ‘item’ column

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sarah,

You could look into using the “Label by” section in the settings panel…there are a ton of options there
FYI You can a formula column to customize also
It should hopefully get something similar to what you are looking for

Cheers,
Harsh
